hypothesis: Non-preshuffle _gemm_a16wfp4_kernel with NUM_KSPLIT=1, ATOMIC_ADD=False for M<=64 non-split-K shapes — eliminates inner-loop B reshape+permute, uses raw B_q (N,K/2) with un-shuffled B scales; library kernel (not custom) so may have cached binary
